category_sources: source_facts.description says DataStax cql-proxy enables Cassandra apps to use Astra DB; official README describes forwarding CQL traffic to a database service.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is cql-proxy; official repository title is datastax/cql-proxy.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README contains configuration, getting started, Docker, Kubernetes, and known issues sections.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already supplied as https://github.com/datastax/cql-proxy; per instruction repo was not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README identify a CQL proxy/sidecar for Cassandra and Astra DB.
